title: Extracting Key Insights from Log Data
scenario: Extract key insights from a sample log data set containing user activity and event data. Output should include top 5 users with highest engagement, user with highest average session duration, and top 3 events with highest frequency. The output should be formatted as a markdown table with headers and should be limited to 200 words.
constraints: User and event data must be properly formatted and aligned

evaluationCriteria.description: Judge checks if the output adheres to the specified constraints.
Judge checks if the output contains valid markdown syntax.
Judge checks if the extracted insights are accurate and based on the provided log data.
